flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Albizu University-San Juan fell 30% between 2006 and 2009 (204 → 142).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Albizu University-San Juan rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Albizu University-San Juan rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Albizu University-San Juan fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
